Package component.modifier.pathway

Class Pathway

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.pathway.Pathway
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Entrance, Exit
public abstract class Pathway extends Modifier
The Pathway class provides the foundation for tiles that track sequential card data, such as Entrance and Exit.

It maintains a currentIndex to keep track of how many cards have interacted with this tile, allowing it to pull the correct card template from a provided CardCount list.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentCard

      public Card getCurrentCard(List<CardCount> cardCountList)
      Determines which card template corresponds to the current interaction index.

      This method iterates through a list of CardCount objects, subtracting counts from the currentIndex until the correct group is found. * @param cardCountList A list defining the sequence of cards for the level.

      Returns:
      A new Card instance based on the current sequence index, or null if the index exceeds the total count.

    • isBlocking

      public boolean isBlocking()
      Returns:
      false. Pathways (Entrances/Exits) are part of the board infrastructure and generally do not block card movement.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the progression index to 0. Used when restarting a level to ensure the card sequence begins again.
      Specified by:
      reset in class Modifier
